rounds: Two weeks of going through the motions — routine held, which is something, but the Apollo ring moment is the one that's sticking. A colleague noticed, opened a door, and the Joy Police slammed it shut before you even got through. That one counts as a loss.
pattern: They're letting you keep the accessories but taking the conversation.
focus: Next time someone notices something gay on your body — ring, nail, whatever — you don't have to explain it. You just have to not shut it down. One sentence. Any sentence.
